testcase.name: test_merges_email_work_when_personal_exists

failure.message: AssertionError: Work email should be added assert None == 'work_1772216223@company.com' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf922860f6e00>('email_work') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf922860f6e00> = {'_id': '69a1df9f2c77ffec633a33a4', 'anniversary': None, 'birthday': None, 'created_at': '2026-02-27T18:17:03.682000', ...}.get

testcase.failure: tests/test_contact_matching.py:385: in test_merges_email_work_when_personal_exists assert contact_data.get("email_work") == work_email, f"Work email should be added" E AssertionError: Work email should be added E assert None == 'work_1772216223@company.com' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf922860f6e00>('email_work') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf922860f6e00> = {'_id': '69a1df9f2c77ffec633a33a4', 'anniversary': None, 'birthday': None, 'created_at': '2026-02-27T18:17:03.682000', ...}.get
